name: Linkwarden
description: Bookmark Preservation for Individuals and Teams
compose:
name: slashnode-linkwarden
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: linkwarden-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: linkwarden
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/linkwarden/linkwarden:v2.14.1
    container_name: linkwarden-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:linkwarden@linkwarden-postgres:5432/postgres
      NEXTAUTH_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8233/api/v1/auth
      NEXTAUTH_SECRET: linkwarden
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/data/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8233:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  postgres_data-db:
    name: slashnode-linkwarden_postgres_data-db
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-linkwarden_app_data-app
